tagline: First Flash model with thinking capability; updated 09-2025 preview improved agentic benchmarks.

overview: Gemini 2.5 Flash is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Flash line. Released 2025-04-17. Fast, cost-efficient mid-tier Gemini model balancing speed and intelligence.
What's notable in this version: First Flash model with thinking capability; updated 09-2025 preview improved agentic benchmarks.
